domain: Yagi-Uda antenna (single driven dipole + multiple passive phase-tuned parasitic elements producing directional gain via near-field phase coupling)
specific_mechanism: Single active source + multiple frozen passive elements with phase-tuned lengths give directional output via interference.
llm_application: YPPS: one actively-trained driven head + multiple frozen passive heads with phase-tuned offsets; final output = phase-coupled sum across array; directors add forward gain on desired behavior, reflectors cancel reverse.
novelty_claim: EasySteer (2509.25175), Activation Steering (2604.08169), KV Cache Steering (2507.08799) cover single-direction steering. YPPS uses ARRAYED passive heads with phase-coupled directional summation.
